ogTitle: Cobram East vs Cobungra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cobram East and Cobungra.
heading: Cobram East vs Cobungra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cobram East, Victoria and Cobungra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cobram East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cobungra (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cobram East or Cobungra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cobram East has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Cobungra scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cobram East scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Cobungra scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cobram East or Cobungra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cobram East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
